vocab.meaning: chỉnh sửa cho đẹp hơn/làm bóng bẩy hơn
vocab.example: I usually spend a few minutes with an editing app to spruce up my landscape shots before posting them online.

vocab.meaning: cắt bỏ phần không mong muốn trong ảnh
vocab.example: If there's a distracting element in the corner of the frame, I'll just crop it out to maintain the focus on the subject.

vocab.meaning: nhìn lại/hồi tưởng lại (kỷ niệm qua ảnh)
vocab.example: Taking photos is vital for me because I love to look back on those precious moments years later.

vocab.meaning: làm nổi bật (chi tiết, đặc điểm hoặc cảm xúc)
vocab.example: The right lighting can really bring out the textures of the old building's stone walls in a photograph.

vocab.meaning: trở nên hứng thú/bắt đầu đam mê cái gì
vocab.example: I first got into photography when my father gifted me an old film camera on my tenth birthday.

vocab.meaning: khoe/trưng bày (tác phẩm hoặc kỹ năng)
vocab.example: Social media platforms are great places for amateur photographers to show off their creative work to the world.

vocab.meaning: thử nghiệm/vọc vạch một cách thoải mái
vocab.example: On weekends, I enjoy messing about with different filters and exposure settings to see what unique effects I can create.

vocab.meaning: ghi lại trên (phim, thẻ nhớ, thiết bị)
vocab.example: There's a unique aesthetic to images captured on film that digital cameras simply cannot replicate.
I like using a shallow depth of field to make the main subject stand out against a blurred background.

vocab.meaning: cân nhắc/thử nghiệm (một ý tưởng hoặc kỹ thuật mới)
vocab.example: Lately, I’ve been toying with the idea of drone photography to get a bird’s-eye view of my city.
